title: Rosewood Vienna

description.text: I was commissioned to do a wall painting in the Tea Room of the new Rosewood hotel in Vienna. You find a garden of nourishing, healing and welcoming plants, trees and flowers from all over the world in this elegant room, where guests are able to have a cozy coffee or bubbly and some delicious chocolates while looking out onto the streets of Vienna.

location: Tea Room. Rosewood Hotel. Vienna, Austria
